setFilter(int, int, int, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.ble.RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx
 
setFilter(int, int, int, String) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
设置循环盘点符合过滤条件的标签，不符合过滤条件的标签将不会上传。注意：必须在循环盘点标签之前设置
Set up a round-robin inventory of tags that meet the filter conditions, and tags that do not meet the filter conditions will not be uploaded.
setFilter(int, int, int, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.serialport.SPUR4Linux
 
setFilter(int, int, int, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinux
 
setFilter(int, int, int, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinuxDeviceAPI
过滤循环盘点的标签，在UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.startInventoryTag()循环盘点标签之前，可以设置要过滤的数据。
Filter tag in auto scan mode, before scanning tags UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.startInventoryTag(), setup data that needs to be filtered.
设置过滤条件之后，盘点标签时将符合过滤条件的标签上传到缓存区UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.readTagFromBuffer()。
After setup, upload filtered tags to buffer UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.readTagFromBuffer().

设置循环盘点符合过滤条件的标签，不符合过滤条件的标签将不会上传。注意：必须在循环盘点标签之前设置

setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
设置盘点回调接口，接收循环盘点到的标签数据
Set the inventory callback interface to receive the label data from the cyclic inventory
备注：需要在开始循环盘点IUHF.startInventoryTag()之前调用此方法。
Note: This method needs to be called before starting the loop inventory IUHF.startInventoryTag().

startInventoryTag() - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
开始循环识别标签。 获取标签数据有两种方式，只能二选一，推荐使用方式一。
Begin looping through the identification labels.

startInventoryTag() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinux
 
startInventoryTag() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinuxDeviceAPI
启动识别Tag循环，只是开启识别Tag循环，之后将识别到的标签号上传到缓冲区， UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.readTagFromBuffer()
Enable Tag auto reading and upload tag number to buffer, UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.readTagFromBuffer()
用于从缓冲区读取一个标签号数据，开启循环识别之后，模块只能响应UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.stopInventory()函数 。
Read tag data from buffer, after switch on auto reading, module will give feedback to UsbLinuxDeviceAPI.stopInventory() only.

stopInventory() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinuxDeviceAPI
停止循环识别，在调用此函数之后应当退出循环获取缓冲区的标签信息的子线程
